arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe increases Man Utd stake with fresh cash injection
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe has invested more money in Man Utd to increase his ownership stake.

arts.ttl: Ratcliffe pays £79m for increased Man Utd stake
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe has increased his shareholding in Manchester United, according to U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) filings released on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Telling Marcus Rashford trend shows Ruben Amorim thinking, Man United truth and Alejandro Garnacho contrast
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim left Marcus Rashford and Alejandro Garnacho out of the squad for the Premier League derby win over Manchester City.
